themeConfig.logoTreatment: Northstar monogram with a compass-star accent

screenMap.title: Operations Dashboard
screenMap.purpose: Give operators a live view of workload, approvals, risk, and throughput.

screenMap.title: Entity Workbench
screenMap.purpose: Manage business entities through typed forms, tables, and detail views.

screenMap.title: Workflow Orchestrator
screenMap.purpose: Track multi-step operational flows with visible ownership and escalation.

screenMap.title: Approval Center
screenMap.purpose: Keep irreversible actions behind explicit review and audit events.

screenMap.title: Audit Stream
screenMap.purpose: Trace meaningful workflow events and changes across the tenant boundary.

screenMap.title: Roles and Access
screenMap.purpose: Review least-privilege access and approval scopes by role.

screenMap.title: Integrations
screenMap.purpose: Make sync boundaries, credential ownership, and failure modes explicit.

screenMap.title: Notifications
screenMap.purpose: Configure operator-facing rules and escalation paths.

screenMap.title: Reports
screenMap.purpose: Expose operational summaries and trend views for review.

screenMap.title: Settings
screenMap.purpose: Handle tenant-aware configuration without hard-coding secrets or approvals.

copyMap.text: Northstar Medical Logistics needs an internal enterprise app built from reusable primitives for Build an internal operations app with dispatch dashboard, service tickets, pickup and delivery workflows, warehouse inventory status, hospital account views, technician task assignments, approvals for urgent replacements, audit logs, role-based access, and reporting. Include admin settings, notification rules, CSV import and export, and future ERP integration support.

Build an internal operations app with dispatch dashboard, service tickets, pickup and delivery workflows, warehouse inventory status, hospital account views, technician task assignments, approvals for urgent replacements, audit logs, role-based access, and reporting. Include admin settings, notification rules, CSV import and export, and future ERP integration support.
Show workload movement, completion rates, and backlog shape.

notes: Figma integration is adapter-based and optional.
Generation does not fail when no design adapter is configured.
Use the token and screen map payloads as the boundary for future Figma MCP work.
